Notice Of Motion For Leave To Intervene
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANT WESCO INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Leave To Intervene.

Proposed Intervenor Wesco Insurance Company's motion for leave to intervene is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Wesco shall file its complaint in intervention no later than June 30, 2025.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
